_comment: markdownlint config for super-linter. Common pragmatic relaxations:
_comment_line-length: MD013 — line-length: README/runbook prose is hard-wrapped or not; either is fine.
_comment_inline-html:
MD033 — inline HTML: occasional
/
in runbooks is fine.
_comment_first-heading: MD041 — first line must be h1: vault notes sometimes start with frontmatter or a callout.
_comment_dup-headers: MD024 — duplicate headings: ADR / changelog patterns repeat 'Context'/'Consequences'.
_comment_bare-url: MD034 — bare URLs: ergonomic in tables and runbooks.
_comment_code-fence-lang: MD040 — fenced code language: not every snippet needs a language tag.
